charging_network_experiences.quote: Out of 4 fast charging sessions, 2 were flawless, 1 went inactive as soon as I reached and 1 had power cut just after adding enough charge.

Status of each station is updated live on respective app. However, there is a chance of station becoming unavailable after we start our journey... Wait for one of the charging guns to get free OR request the current user.

long_term_issues: HV Battery pack replacement required due to 'bad cells' within 1 year/15,000 km
Charging gun jam (actuator failure) caused by dust and mud from rear wheels
Sudden SoC drop (e.g., 23% to 0% within 6 km)
Uneven tire wear suspected to be caused by camber issues after 35,000 km
things_owners_love: Silence, pickup, technology and cost effectiveness
Selectable regeneration and cruise control added via Prime update
Most stress free driving experience I've had in Mumbai traffic
The superb power delivery and refinement
honest_verdict: Owners are genuinely impressed by the EV's refinement and low running costs, but the ownership experience is marred by critical reliability failures like total battery pack replacements. While the driving experience is superior to ICE cars, long-distance travel still requires obsessive planning due to inconsistent charging infrastructure.
